sections.paragraph:
Original: אשׂריאל

Transliteration: 'aśrı̂y'êl

Phonetic: as-ree-ale'

BDB Definition:

Ashriel = "I shall be prince of God"
  1. a great-grandson of Manasseh, and son of Gilead
  2. a son of Manasseh

Origin: an orthographical variation for H840

TWOT entry: None

Part(s) of speech: Proper Name Masculine
